unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Draw a happy face on the center of the plate.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：cen（看作cent，分/美分）+ ter -> 把硬币放在正中间。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Make a hole (洞) at the top of the plate.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语记忆：at the top of...，表示“在……的顶部”。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：thr + ough，穿过树林（through the forest）。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We must take off shoes when we get into our house.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语记忆：take off脱下，反义词是put on穿上。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Nobody wants to get disturbed(受干扰的) while they sleep well.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：no（没有）+ body（人/身体）-> 没有人。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Two robots cook different kinds of food;
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：kind作形容词时是“善良的”，作名词时是“种类”。
短语记忆：do (做) + the dishes (盘子/餐具) -> 洗盘子，清洗餐具。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Luckily, John is good at studying robots and he knows robots very well.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语记忆：be good at + doing sth. 表示“擅长做某事”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I think there will be a lot of robot-themed(机器人主题的) restaurants around the world in the future.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语记忆：around（周围）+ the world（世界）-> 环绕世界，即“全世界”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They love spending time together, but they also know how to respect(尊重) each other's personal space.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：person（人）+ al（形容词后缀，……的）-> 个人的，私人的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They love spending time together, but they also know how to respect(尊重) each other's personal space.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：sp + ace（王牌）-> 在太空中打王牌。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Emma usually asks politely, "Would you like some?"
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：polite（有礼貌的）+ ly（副词后缀）-> 礼貌地。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: But when there is too much plankton, it hurts other animals in the sea.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：hu + rt（看作run tired，跑累了）-> 跑累了容易受伤（hurt）。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: This brings trouble for fishermen who grow mussels (贻贝).
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：tr（看作tree，树）+ ouble（看作double，双倍）-> 双倍的树木砍伐带来了“麻烦”。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: This brings trouble for fishermen who grow mussels (贻贝).
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：gr（看作green，绿色的）+ ow -> 绿色植物正在“生长”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It takes oxygen(氧气) from the water and does not let enough sunlight in.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：e + nough（读音像“拿夫”）-> 拿够了，表示“足够”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It takes oxygen(氧气) from the water and does not let enough sunlight in.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：sun（太阳）+ light（光）-> 阳光。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Now more than 80% of fishermen are having problems.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语记忆：more（更多）+ than（比）-> 比……更多，即“多于、超出”。
